title: Outline of critical theory
content:
The following outline is provided as an overview of and topical guide to critical theory: Critical theory – the examination and critique of society and culture, drawing from knowledge across the social science s and humanities. The term has two different meanings with different origins and histories: one originating in sociology and the other in literary criticism.

This has led to the very literal use of'critical theory' as an umbrella term to describe any theory founded upon critique. African-American studies. African-American theory Gender studies. Gender studies Marxist theory. Marxist philosophy Postcolonialism. Postcolonialism Structuralism. Structuralism Deconstruction. Deconstruction Postmodernism. Postmodernism Reconstructivism. Reconstructivism Psychoanalytic theory. Psychoanalytic theory Queer theory. Queer theory Semiotics. Semiotics Cultural anthropology. Cultural anthropology Major theorists. List of critical theorists
